summary:
Lane D3: Drizzle .all()/.run() → portable migration

Surveyed all 6 target files. Found Drizzle .all() calls in 2 files:
- storage/adapter.ts: DrizzleLikeClient interface defined .all()/.run() methods; needed portable .execute() method
- storage/pipeline.ts: 2 x db.all(sql) raw SQL calls

4 other files (storage/storage.ts, lsp/lsp.ts, lsp/server.ts, lsp/client.ts) had no Drizzle calls — only Promise.all() and Process.run() etc.

Changes made:
1. Added `execute: <T = any>(query: any) => Promise<{ rows: T[] }>` to DrizzleLikeClient interface
2. Implemented execute() in DuckDB adapter (wraps client.all() with {rows} shape)
3. Implemented execute() in SQLite adapter (wraps pg.query() with {rows} shape)
4. Updated DuckDB error message to reference db.execute() instead of db.all()
5. Migrated pipeline.ts 2 x db.all(sql) → db.execute(sql).then(r => r.rows)

Typecheck: PASS (exit 0)
Validator: ALL CLEAR
